messages.content:
For the pilot shipments, can you consolidate all the material numbers from each PO onto one list for me, which would be the following columns in the excel sheet;

PO number
Material Number
Brand
PacD new carton size L
PacD new carton size W
PacD new carton size H
PacD confirmed material
Units per carton quantity
Quantity of product per PO

I just need the data for now, none of the pictures at the moment.
翻译

对于试点发货，请您为我把每个采购订单中的全部物料号整合成一个列表，包括以下在Excel表格中的列：

采购订单号
物料号
品牌
PacD 新箱尺寸 L
PacD 新箱尺寸 W
PacD 新箱尺寸 H
PacD 确认的材料
每箱数量
每个采购订单的产品数量

我只需要数据，目前不需要图片。
文件标题起什么好呢？英文
What would be a good title for the file?

For the pilot shipments, can you consolidate all the material numbers from each PO onto one list for me, which would be the following columns in the excel sheet;

PO number
Material Number
Brand
PacD new carton size L
PacD new carton size W
PacD new carton size H
PacD confirmed material
Units per carton quantity
Quantity of product per PO

I just need the data for now, none of the pictures at the moment. 我是说这个
Possible title could be: "Consolidated Material List for Pilot Shipments" or "PO Material Data for Pilot Shipments".
其他可能的标题包括： "Excel Sheet for Pilot Shipments Material Consolidation"，"Summary of Material Numbers for Pilot Shipments"， "Pilot Shipments PO Material List".

I have already as your requirements to create an excel work book, please see attached. To more clear of the brand, I have also included a column of Brand Description for your reference. If you need the L*W*H with cm unit, I have also translated it on sheet 2 for your reference. 
优化一下

I have created an Excel workbook as per your request, which is attached. To clarify the brand, I have also included a column for Brand Description. Additionally, if you need the dimensions in cm, I have provided a translation in sheet 2 for your reference.
帮我再加一些话，表格里的单位是inch，如果你需要cm的话，英文
The units used in the table are in inches. If you require the values in centimeters, please let me know.

I have created an Excel workbook as per your request, which is attached. To clarify the brand, I have also included a column for Brand Description. Additionally, if you need the dimensions in cm, I have provided a translation in sheet 2 for your reference. 整合在这段话理

Sure, here's the updated sentence with the additional information added:

I have created an Excel workbook as per your request, which is attached. To clarify the brand, I have also included a column for Brand Description. The units used in the table are in inches, but if you require the dimensions in centimeters, I have provided a translation in sheet 2 for your reference.

Sure, here are a few additional translations you can use:

- "The dimensions of the table are in inches. If you require them in centimeters, please let me know."
- "The dimensions listed in the table are in inches. If you prefer to have them in centimeters, I would be happy to provide a conversion."
- "All the measurements in the table are listed in inches. If you require the values to be converted to centimeters, kindly inform me."
I have provided a translation in sheet 2 for your reference，我是说这里不是translation。

Oh, I'm sorry for misunderstanding your previous message. Here's an updated version of the sentence:

I have created an Excel workbook as per your request, which is attached. To clarify the brand, I have also included a column for Brand Description. The units used in the table are in inches, but if you need the values in centimeters instead, I have also included a conversion chart in sheet 2 for your reference.
